title: Question: Accessing interface parameters
body: --- Author Name: **Trevor Elbourne** Original Redmine Message: 2060 from https://www.veripool.org --- I'm having a problem with interface parameters, which I think should work: ``` interface intf #(parameter WIDTH=8) (input wire clk); logic [WIDTH-1:0] data; endinterface module my_mod(intf i); logic [i.WIDTH-1:0] d; // THIS WORKS intf #(.WIDTH(i.WIDTH)) my_intf(i.clk); // <------------ Error HERE endmodule ``` When I run verilator, I get the following error: %Error: Internal Error: testcase.v:19: ../V3Width.cpp:1181: Unlinked varref Our commercial compiler works with this example. The signal declaration is OK using the interface parameter, but not the when setting the parameter on the interface instance??
